rider-waite.name: Rider-Waite
rider-waite.author: Arthur Edward Waite
rider-waite.description: This is an excerpt from the THE KEY TO THE TAROT commonly included with the Rider-Waite cards.
rider-waite.1: Skill, diplomacy, address, sickness, pain, loss, disaster, self-confidence, will, the Querent himself (if male).
rider-waite.1r: Physician, Magus, mental illness, disgrace, disquiet.
rider-waite.2: Secrets, mystery, the future as yet unrevealed, the woman who interests the Querent (if male); the Querent (if female) silence, tenacity; wisdom, science.
rider-waite.2r: Passion, moral or physical ardor, conceit, surface knowledge.
rider-waite.3: Fruitfulness, initiative, action, long days, clandestine, the unknown, difficulty, doubt, ignorance.
rider-waite.3r: Light, truth, the unraveling of involved matters, public rejoice, also, according to another reading—vacillation.
rider-waite.4: Stability, power, aid, protection, a great person, conviction, reason.
rider-waite.4r: Benevolence, compassion, credit, also confusion to enemies, obstruction, immaturity.
rider-waite.5: Marriage alliance, captivity, servitude, mercy and goodness, inspiration, the man to whom the Querent has recourse.
rider-waite.5r: Society, good understanding, concord, over-kindness, weakness.
rider-waite.7: Succor, providence, also war, triumph, presumption, ven-geance, trouble.
rider-waite.8r: Abuse of power, despotism, weakness, discord.
rider-waite.9: Prudence, also and especially treason, dissimulation, corruption, roguery.
rider-waite.9r: Concealment, disguise, policy, fear, unreasoned caution.
rider-waite.11r: Law in all departments, bigotry, bias, excessive severity.
rider-waite.12: Wisdom, trials, circumspection, discernment, sacrifice, intuition, divination, prophecy.
rider-waite.14r: Things connected with churches, religions, sects, the priesthood, also unfortunate combinations, disunion, competing interests.
rider-waite.15: Ravage, violence, force, vehemence, extraordinary efforts, fatality, that which is predestined but not for this reason evil.
rider-waite.16: Misery, distress, ruin, indigence, adversity, calamity, disgrace, deception.
rider-waite.16r: According to one account, the same in a lesser degree, also oppression, imprisonment, tyranny.
rider-waite.17: Loss, theft, privation, abandonment, although another reading suggests hope and bright prospects in the future.
rider-waite.18: Hidden enemies, danger, calumny, darkness, terror, deception, error.
rider-waite.18r: Instability, inconstancy, silence, lesser degrees of deception and error.
rider-waite.19r: The same in a lesser sense.
rider-waite.20r: Weakness, pusillanimity, simplicity, also deliberation, decision, sentence.
rider-waite.21: Assured success, route, voyage, emigration, flight, change of place.
rider-waite.0: Folly, mania, extravagance, intoxication, delirium, frenzy, bewrayment.
rider-waite.0r: Negligence, absence, distribution, carelessness, apathy, nullity, vanity.
rider-waite.w14: Dark man, friendly, countryman, generally married, honest and conscientious.
rider-waite.w14r: Good, but severe; austere, yet tolerant.
rider-waite.w13: A dark woman or a countrywoman, friendly, chaste, loving, honorable. If the card beside her signifies a man, she is well disposed towards him; if a woman, she is interested in the Querent. Also, love of money.
rider-waite.w13r: Good, economical, obliging, serviceable. Also signifies opposition, jealousy, deceit, and infidelity.
rider-waite.w12: Departure, absence, flight, emigration. A dark young man, friendly. Change of residence.
rider-waite.w11: Dark young man, faithful, a lover, an envoy, a postman. Beside a man, he will bear favorable testimony concerning him. He is a dangerous rival, if followed by the Page of Cups. Has the chief qualities of his suit.
rider-waite.w11r: Anecdotes, announcements, evil news. Also indecision and the instability which usually accompanies it.
rider-waite.w10: A card of many significances, and some of the readings cannot be harmonized. I set aside that which connects it with honor and good faith. It is oppression simply, but it is also fortune, gain, any kind of success of these things. It is also a card of false-seeming, disguise, perfidy. The place which the figure is approaching may suffer from the rods that he carries. Success is stultified if the Nine of Swords follows, and if it is a question of a lawsuit— there will be certain loss.
rider-waite.w10r: Contrarieties, difficulties, intrigues, and their analogies.
rider-waite.w9: The card signifies strength in opposition. If attacked, he will meet the onslaught boldly. With this main significance there are all its possible adjuncts, including delay, suspension, adjournment.
rider-waite.w8: Activity in undertakings, the path of such activity, swiftness, as that of an express messenger; great haste, great hope, speed towards an end which promises assured felicity; that which is on the move, also the arrows of love.
rider-waite.w8r: Arrows of jealousy, internal dispute, stingings of conscience, quarrels.
rider-waite.w7: It is a card of valor, for on the surface, six are attacking one, who has, however, the vantage position. On the intellectual plane, it signifies discussion, wordy strife, in business—negotiations, war of trade, barter, competition. It is further a card of success, for the combatant is on the top and his enemies may be unable to reach him.
rider-waite.w6: The card has been so designed that it can cover several significations. On the surface, it is a victor triumphing, but it is also great news, such as might be carried in state by the King's courier. It is expectation crowned with its own desire, the crown of hope.
rider-waite.w6r: Apprehension, fear—as of a victorious enemy at the gate, treachery, disloyalty, as of gates being opened to the enemy.
rider-waite.w5: Imitation, for example, sham fight, the strenuous competition and struggle of the search after riches and fortune. Hence some attributions say that it is a card of gold, gain, opulence.
rider-waite.w4: They are for once almost on the surface—country life, repose, concord, harmony, prosperity, peace, and the perfected work of these.
rider-waite.w4r: The meaning remains unaltered—increase, felicity, beauty, embellishment.
rider-waite.w3: He symbolizes established strength, enterprise, effort, trade, discovery, commerce; those are his ships, bearing his merchandise, which are sailing over the sea.
rider-waite.w3r: The end of troubles, suspension or end of adversity, disappointment, and toil.
rider-waite.w2: Between the alternative readings there is no marriage possible, on the one hand, riches, fortune, magnificence. And on the other, physical suffering, disease, chagrin, sadness, mortification. The design gives one suggestion— here is a lord overlooking his dominion and alternately contemplating a globe. It looks like the malady, the mortification, the sadness of Alexander amidst the grandeur of this world’ s wealth.
rider-waite.w2r: Surprise, wonder, enchantment, emotion, trouble, fear.
rider-waite.w1: Creation, invention, enterprise, the powers which result in these, principle, beginning, source, birth, family, origin, the beginning of enterprises, according to another account—money, fortune, inheritance.
rider-waite.w1r: Fall, decadence, ruin, perdition, to perish, also—clouded joy.
rider-waite.c14: Fair man, man of business, law, or divinity, responsible, disposed to oblige the Querent. Also equity, art and science, including those who profess science, law and art, creative intelligence.
rider-waite.c14r: Dishonest, double-dealing man, roguery, exaction, injustice, vice, scandal.
rider-waite.c13: Good, fair woman, honest, devoted, who will do service to the Querent. Loving intelligence, and hence the gift of vision, success, happiness, pleasure, also wisdom, virtue.
rider-waite.c13r: The accounts vary; good woman, otherwise, distinguished woman but one not to be trusted, perverse woman, vice, dishonor, depravity.
rider-waite.c12: Arrival, approach—sometimes that of a messenger, advances, proposition, demeanor, invitation, incitement.
rider-waite.c12r: Trickery, artifice, subtlety, swindling, duplicity, fraud.
rider-waite.c11: Fair young man, one impelled to render service and with whom the Querent will be connected, a studious youth, news, message, application, reflection, meditation—also these things directed to business.
rider-waite.c11r: Taste, inclination, attachment, seduction, deception, artifice.
rider-waite.c10: Contentment, repose of the entire heart—the perfection of that state, if with several picture cards, a person who is taking charge of the Querent’ s interests. Also the town, village or country inhabited by the Querent.
rider-waite.c10r: Repose of the false heart, indignation, violence.
rider-waite.c9: Concord, contentment, physical bien-être; also victory, success, advantage, satisfaction for the Querent or person for whom the consultation is made.
rider-waite.c9r: Truth, loyalty, liberty. But the readings vary and include mistakes, imperfections, etc.
rider-waite.c8: The card speaks for itself on the surface, but other readings are entirely antithetical—giving joy, mildness, timidity, honor, modesty.
rider-waite.c7: Fairy favors, images of reflection, imagination, sentiment, things seen in the glass of contemplation, some attainment in these degrees but nothing permanent or substantial is suggested.
rider-waite.c6: A card of memories and of the past. For example, reflecting on childhood, happiness, enjoyment, but coming rather from the past, things that have vanished. Another reading reverses this, suggesting new relations, new environment and new knowledge.
rider-waite.c6r: Renewal, the future, that which will come to pass presently.
rider-waite.c5: It is a card of loss, but something remains; three have been taken, but two are left. It is a card of inheritance, transmission, and patrimony. It may be a card of marriage, but not without bitterness or frustration.
rider-waite.c5r: News, alliances, affinity, ancestry, return, false projects.
rider-waite.c4: Weariness, disgust, aversion, imaginary vexations—as if the wine of this world had caused satiety only. Another cup of wine, as if a fairy gift, is now offered him, but he sees no consolation therein. This is also a card of blended pleasure.
rider-waite.c4r: Novelty, omen, new instructions, new relations.
rider-waite.c3: The conclusion of any matter. Plenty, perfection, merriment, happiness, victory, fulfillment, solace, healing.
rider-waite.c2: Love, passion, friendship, affinity, union, concord, sexual relations. That which nature has santified.
rider-waite.c1: True heart, joy, contentment, abode, nourishment, abundance, fertility, holy table, felicity.
rider-waite.s14: Whatsoever arises out of the idea of judgment and all its connections—power, command, authority, militant intelligence, law, offices of the crown, and so forth.
rider-waite.s14r: Cruelty, evil intentions, perversity, barbarity, breach of faith.
rider-waite.s13: Widowhood, female sadness and embarrassment, absence, sterility, mourning, privation, separation.
rider-waite.s12: Skill, bravery, capacity, defense, address, enmity, wrath, war, destruction, opposition, resistance, ruin.
rider-waite.s11: Authority, overseeing, secret service, vigilance, spying, examination, and the qualities thereto belonging.
rider-waite.s11r: More evil side of these qualities, what is unforeseen, an unprepared state, sickness is also intimated.
rider-waite.s10: Whatsoever is intimated by the design— also pain, affliction, tears, sadness, desolation.
rider-waite.s10r: Advantage, profit, success, favor, but none of these are permanent. Also power and authority.
rider-waite.s9: Death, failure, miscarriage, delay, deception, disappointment, despair.
rider-waite.s9r: Imprisonment, doubt, suspicion, reasonable fear, shame.
rider-waite.s8: Bad news, violent chagrin, crisis, censure, power in trammels, conflict, calumny—also sickness.
rider-waite.s8r: Disquiet, difficulty, opposition, accident, treachery, the unforeseen, fatality.
rider-waite.s7: Design, attempt, wish, hope, confidence—also quarrelling. A plan that may fail, annoyance.
rider-waite.s7r: Good advice, counsel, instruction, slander, babbling.
rider-waite.s6: Journey by water, route, way, envoy, commissionary, expedient.
rider-waite.s6r: Declaration, confession, publicity. One account says that it is a proposal of love.
rider-waite.s5: Degradation, destruction, reversal, infamy, dishonor, loss.
rider-waite.s4: Vigilance, retreat, solitude, hermit’ s repose, exile, tomb and coffin.
rider-waite.s4r: Wise administration, circumspection, economy, avarice, precaution, testament.
rider-waite.s3: Removal, absence, delay, division, rupture, dispersion, and all that the design signifies naturally.
rider-waite.s3r: Mental alienation, error, loss, distraction, disorder, confusion.
rider-waite.s2: Conformity and the equipoise which it suggests, courage, friendship, affection, concord in a state of arms, intimacy.
rider-waite.s1: Triumph, the excessive degree in everything, conquest, triumph of force. A card of great force, in love as well as in hatred.
rider-waite.s1r: The same meanings, but the results are disastrous; another account says—conception, childbirth, augmentation, multiplicity.
rider-waite.p14: Valor, realizing intelligence, business and normal intellectual aptitude, sometimes mathematical gifts and attainments of this kind—success in these paths.
rider-waite.p14r: Vice, weakness, ugliness, perversity, corruption, peril.
rider-waite.p12r: Inertia, idleness, repose of that kind, stagnation— also discouragement, carelessness.
rider-waite.p11: Application, study scholarship, reflection. Another reading says news, messages and the bringer thereof—also rule, management.
rider-waite.p11r: Prodigality, dissipation, liberality, luxury, unfavorable news.
rider-waite.p10: Gain, riches, family matters, archives, extraction, the abode of a family.
rider-waite.p10r: Chance, fatality, loss, robbery, games of hazard; sometimes gift, dowry, pension.
rider-waite.p9: Prudence, safety, success, accomplishment, certitude, discernment.
rider-waite.p9r: Roguery, deception, voided project, bad faith.
rider-waite.p8: Work, employment, commission, craftsmanship, skill in craft and business.
rider-waite.p8r: Voided ambition, vanity, cupidity, exaction, usury.
rider-waite.p7: These are exceedingly contradictory, in the main, it is a card of money, business, barter—but one reading gives altercation, quarrel, and another innocence, ingenuity, purgation.
rider-waite.p6: Presents, gifts, gratification. Another account says attention, vigilance, now is the accepted time, present prosperity, etc.
rider-waite.p5: It foretells material trouble above all, whether in the form illustrated, that is, destitution, or otherwise. For some cartomancists, it is a card of love and lovers—wife, husband, friend, mistress— also concordance, affinities. These alternatives cannot be harmonized.
rider-waite.p4: The surety of possessions, cleaving to that which one has, gifts, legacy, inheritance.
rider-waite.p3: Métier, trade, skilled labor. Usually, however, regarded as a card of nobility, aristocracy, renown, glory.
rider-waite.p3r: Mediocrity in work and otherwise, puerility, pettiness, weakness.
rider-waite.p2: It is represented as a card of gaiety, recreation and its connections, which is the subject of the design. But it is read also as news and messages in writing, such as obstacles, agitation, trouble, embroilment.
rider-waite.p2r: Enforced gaiety, simulated enjoyment, literal sense, handwriting, composition, letters of exchange.
rider-waite.p1: Perfect contentment, felicity, ecstasy— also speedy intelligence, gold.
rider-waite.p1r: The evil side of wealth, bad intelligence. Also great riches.

labyrinthos.name: Labyrinthos
labyrinthos.author: Tina Gong
labyrinthos.description: This is an excerpt from the modern interpretations by Labrinthos LLC. Please click the interpretations for deeper topic-based meanings!
labyrinthos.1: willpower, desire, being resourceful, skill, ability, concentration, manifestation
labyrinthos.1r: manipulation, cunning, trickery, wasted talent, illusion, deception
labyrinthos.2: unconscious, intuition, mystery, spirituality, higher power, inner voice
labyrinthos.2r: repressed intuition, hidden motives, superficiality, confusion, cognitive dissonance
labyrinthos.3: divine feminine, sensuality, fertility, nurturing, creativity, beauty, abundance, nature
labyrinthos.3r: insecurity, overbearing, negligence, smothering, lack of growth, lack of progress
labyrinthos.4: stability, structure, protection, authority, control, practicality, focus, discipline
labyrinthos.4r: tyrant, domineering, rigid, stubborn, lack of discipline, recklessness
labyrinthos.5: tradition, social groups, conventionality, conformity, education, knowledge, beliefs
labyrinthos.6: love, unions, partnerships, relationships, choices, romance, balance, unity
labyrinthos.6r: disharmony, imbalance, conflict, detachment, bad choices, indecision
labyrinthos.7: success, ambition, determination, willpower, control, self-discipline, focus
labyrinthos.7r: forceful, no direction, no control, powerless, aggression, obstacles
labyrinthos.8: courage, bravery, confidence, compassion, self-confidence, inner power
labyrinthos.8r: self-doubt, weakness, low confidence, inadequacy, cowardice, forcefulness
labyrinthos.9: self-reflection, introspection, contemplation, withdrawal, solitude, search for self
labyrinthos.9r: loneliness, isolation, recluse, being anti-social, rejection, returning to society
labyrinthos.10: change, cycles, fate, decisive moments, luck, fortune, unexpected events
labyrinthos.10r: bad luck, lack of control, clinging to control, unwelcome changes, delays
labyrinthos.11: justice, karma, consequence, accountability, law, truth, honesty, integrity, cause and effect
labyrinthos.11r: injustice, retribution, dishonesty, corruption, dishonesty, unfairness, avoiding accountability
labyrinthos.12: sacrifice, waiting, uncertainty, lack of direction, perspective, contemplation
labyrinthos.12r: stalling, disinterest, stagnation, avoiding sacrifice, standstill, apathy
labyrinthos.13: transformation, endings, change, transition, letting go, release
labyrinthos.13r: fear of change, repeating negative patterns, resisting change, stagnancy, decay
labyrinthos.14: balance, peace, patience, moderation, calm, tranquillity, harmony, serenity
labyrinthos.15: oppression, addiction, obsession, dependency, excess, powerlessness, limitations
labyrinthos.15r: independence, freedom, revelation, release, reclaiming power, reclaiming control
labyrinthos.16: disaster, destruction, upheaval, trauma, sudden change, chaos
labyrinthos.16r: averting disaster, delaying the inevitable, resisting change
labyrinthos.17: hope, inspiration, positivity, faith, renewal, healing, rejuvenation
labyrinthos.17r: hopelessness, despair, negativity, lack of faith, despondent
labyrinthos.18: illusion, intuition, uncertainty, confusion, complexity, secrets, unconscious
labyrinthos.18r: fear, deception, anxiety, misunderstanding, misinterpretation, clarity, understanding
labyrinthos.19: happiness, success, optimism, vitality, joy, confidence, happiness, truth
labyrinthos.19r: blocked happiness, excessive enthusiasm, pessimism, unrealistic expectations, conceitedness
labyrinthos.20r: self-doubt, lack of self-awareness, failure to learn lessons, self-loathing
labyrinthos.21: completion, achievement, fulfilment, sense of belonging, wholeness, harmony
labyrinthos.21r: lack of closure, lack of achievement, feeling incomplete, emptiness
labyrinthos.0: beginnings, freedom, innocence, originality, adventure, idealism, spontaneity
labyrinthos.0r: reckless, careless, distracted, naive, foolish, gullible, stale, dull
labyrinthos.c1: love, new feelings, emotional awakening, creativity, spirituality, intuition
labyrinthos.c1r: coldness, emptiness, emotional loss, blocked creativity, feeling unloved, gloominess
labyrinthos.c2: unity, partnership, attraction, connection, close bonds, joining forces, mutual respect
labyrinthos.c2r: separation, rejection, division, imbalance, tension, bad communication, withdrawal
labyrinthos.c3: friendship, community, gatherings, celebrations, group events, social events
labyrinthos.c3r: gossip, scandal, excess, isolation, loneliness, solitude, imbalanced social life
labyrinthos.c4: apathy, contemplation, feeling disconnected, melancholy, boredom, indifference, discontent
labyrinthos.c4r: clarity, awareness, acceptance, choosing happiness, depression, negativity
labyrinthos.c5: loss, grief, disappointment, sadness, mourning, discontent, feeling let down
labyrinthos.c5r: acceptance, moving on, finding peace, contentment, seeing positives
labyrinthos.c6: nostalgia, memories, familiarity, healing, comfort, sentimentality, pleasure
labyrinthos.c6r: stuck in past, moving forward, leaving home, independence
labyrinthos.c7: choices, searching for purpose, illusion, fantasy, daydreaming, wishful thinking, indecision
labyrinthos.c7r: lack of purpose, disarray, confusion, diversion, distractions, clarity, making choices
labyrinthos.c8: abandonment, walking away, letting go, searching for truth, leaving behind
labyrinthos.c8r: stagnation, monotony, accepting less, avoidance, fear of change, staying in bad situation
labyrinthos.c9: wishes coming true, contentment, satisfaction, success, achievements, recognition, pleasure
labyrinthos.c9r: unhappiness, lack of fulfilment, disappointment, underachievement, arrogance, snobbery
labyrinthos.c10: happiness, homecomings, fulfillment, emotional stability, security, domestic harmony
labyrinthos.c10r: unhappy home, separation, domestic conflict, disharmony, isolation
labyrinthos.c11: idealism, sensitivity, dreamer, naivete, innocence, inner child, head in the clouds
labyrinthos.c11r: emotional vulnerability, immaturity, neglecting inner child, escapism, insecurity
labyrinthos.c12: idealist, charming, artistic, graceful, tactful, diplomatic, mediator, negotiator
labyrinthos.c12r: disappointment, tantrums, moodiness, turmoil, avoiding conflict, vanity
labyrinthos.c13: compassion, warmth, kindness, intuition, healer, counsellor, supportive
labyrinthos.c13r: insecurity, giving too much, overly-sensitive, needy, fragile, dependence, martyrdom
labyrinthos.c14: wise, diplomatic, balance between head and heart, devoted, advisor, counsellor
labyrinthos.c14r: overwhelmed, anxious, cold, repressed, withdrawn, manipulative, selfish
labyrinthos.p1: new opportunities, resources, abundance, prosperity, security, stability, manifestation
labyrinthos.p1r: missed chances, scarcity, deficiency, instability, stinginess, bad investments
labyrinthos.p2: balancing resources, adaptation, resourcefulness, flexibility, stretching resources
labyrinthos.p3: teamwork, shared goals, collaboration, apprenticeship, effort, pooling energy
labyrinthos.p3r: lack of cohesion, lack of teamwork, apathy, poor motivation, conflict, ego, competition
labyrinthos.p4: possessiveness, insecurity, hoarding, stinginess, stability, security, savings, materialism, wealth, frugality, boundaries, guardedness
labyrinthos.p4r: generosity, giving, spending, openness, financial insecurity, reckless spending
labyrinthos.p5: hardship, loss, isolation, feeling abandoned, adversity, struggle, unemployment, alienation, disgrace
labyrinthos.p5r: positive changes, recovery from loss, overcoming adversity, forgiveness, feeling welcomed
labyrinthos.p6: generosity, charity, community, material help, support, sharing, giving and receiving, gratitude
labyrinthos.p6r: power dynamics, abuse of generosity, strings attached gifts, inequality, extortion
labyrinthos.p7: harvest, rewards, results, growth, progress, perseverance, patience, planning
labyrinthos.p7r: unfinished work, procrastination, low effort, waste, lack of growth, setbacks, impatience, lack of reward
labyrinthos.p8: skill, talent, craftsmanship, quality, high standards, expertise, mastery, commitment, dedication, accomplishment
labyrinthos.p8r: lack of quality, rushed job, bad reputation, lack of motivation, mediocrity, laziness, low skill, dead-end job
labyrinthos.p9: rewarded efforts, success, achievement, independence, leisure, material security, self-sufficiency
labyrinthos.p9r: being guarded, living beyond means, material instability, reckless spending, superficiality
labyrinthos.p10: legacy, roots, family, ancestry, inheritance, windfall, foundations, privilege, affluence, stability, tradition
labyrinthos.p10r: family disputes, bankruptcy, debt, fleeting success, conflict over money, instability, breaking traditions
labyrinthos.p11: ambitious, diligent, goal oriented, planner, consistent, star student, studious, grounded, loyal, faithful, dependable
labyrinthos.p11r: foolish, immature, irresponsible, lazy, underachiever, procrastinator, missed chances, poor prospects
labyrinthos.p12: practical, reliable, efficient, stoic, slow and steady, hard-working, committed, patient, conservative
labyrinthos.p12r: workaholic, laziness, dull, boring, no initiative, cheap, irresponsible, gambler, risky investments
labyrinthos.p13: generous, caring, nurturing, homebody, good business sense, practical, comforting, welcoming, sensible, luxurious
labyrinthos.p13r: selfish, unkempt, jealous, insecure, greedy, materialistic, gold digger, intolerant, self-absorbed, envious
labyrinthos.p14: abundance, prosperity, security, ambitious, safe, kind, patriarchal, protective, businessman, provider, sensual, reliable
labyrinthos.p14r: greed, materialistic, wasteful, chauvanist, poor financial decisions, gambler, exploitative, possessive
labyrinthos.s1: clarity, breakthrough, new idea, concentration, vision, force, focus, truth
labyrinthos.s2: stalemate, difficult choices, stuck in the middle, denial, hidden information
labyrinthos.s2r: indecision, hesitancy, anxiety, too much information, no right choice, truth revealed
labyrinthos.s3: heartbreak, separation, sadness, grief, sorrow, upset, loss, trauma, tears
labyrinthos.s4: rest, relaxation, peace, sanctuary, recuperation, self-protection, rejuvenation
labyrinthos.s4r: recovery, awakening, re-entering world, release from isolation, restlessness, burnout
labyrinthos.s5: arguments, disputes, aggression, bullying, intimidation, conflict, hostility, stress
labyrinthos.s5r: reconciliation, resolution, compromise, revenge, regret, remorse, cutting losses
labyrinthos.s6: moving on, departure, leaving behind, distance, accepting lessons
labyrinthos.s6r: stuck in past, returning to trouble, running away from problems, trapped
labyrinthos.s7: lies, trickery, scheming, strategy, resourcefulness, sneakiness, cunning
labyrinthos.s8: trapped, restricted, victimised, paralysed, helpless, powerless, imprisonment
labyrinthos.s8r: freedom, release, taking control, survivor, facing fears, empowered, surrender
labyrinthos.s9: fear, anxiety, negativity, breaking point, despair, nightmares, isolation
labyrinthos.s9r: recovery, learning to cope, facing life, finding help, shame, guilt, mental health issues
labyrinthos.s10: ruin, failure, bitterness, collapse, exhaustion, dead end, victimization, betrayal
labyrinthos.s10r: survival, improvement, healing, lessons learned, despair, relapse
labyrinthos.s11: curious, witty, chatty, communicative, inspired, vigilant, alert, mental agility
labyrinthos.s11r: scatterbrained, cynical, sarcastic, gossipy, insulting, rude, lack of planning
labyrinthos.s12: assertive, direct, impatient, intellectual, daring, focused, perfectionist, ambitious
labyrinthos.s12r: rude, tactless, forceful, bully, aggressive, vicious, ruthless, arrogant
labyrinthos.s13: honest, independent, principled, fair, constructive criticism, objective, perceptive
labyrinthos.s13r: pessimistic, malicious, manipulative, harsh, bitter, spiteful, cruel, deceitful, unforgiving
labyrinthos.s14: reason, authority, discipline, integrity, morality, serious, high standards, strict
labyrinthos.s14r: irrational, dictator, oppressive, inhumane, controlling, cold, ruthless, dishonest
labyrinthos.w1: inspiration, creative spark, new initiative, new passion, enthusiasm, energy
labyrinthos.w1r: delays, blocks, lack of passion, lack of energy, hesitancy, creative blocks
labyrinthos.w2: planning, first steps, making decisions, leaving comfort, taking risks
labyrinthos.w2r: bad planning, overanalyzing, not taking action, playing it safe, avoiding risk
labyrinthos.w3: momentum, confidence, expansion, growth, foresight, looking ahead
labyrinthos.w3r: restriction, limitations, lack of progress, obstacles, delays, frustration
labyrinthos.w4: community, home, celebrations, reunions, parties, gatherings, stability, belonging
labyrinthos.w4r: lack of support, instability, feeling unwelcome, transience, lack of roots, home conflict
labyrinthos.w5: conflict, competition, arguments, aggression, tension, rivals, clashes of ego
labyrinthos.w5r: end of conflict, cooperation, agreements, truces, harmony, peace, avoiding conflict
labyrinthos.w6: success, victory, triumph, rewards, recognition, praise, acclaim, pride
labyrinthos.w6r: failure, lack of recognition, no rewards, lack of achievement
